Somebody hold his forehead!

Come ont

EXT. LAKE SIDE - LATER

NICHOLAS
Watch out for Sunami Sam!
Widen out to see NICHOLAS leap off the dock face first into

ON THE DECK

clipboard. In the water the kids frolic, doing cannonballs,

BETH
Beth.

Bi Beth. Do you want to dance?

No.

I see. No. Really?

Uh, excuse me. I have to go to the

TIM & PAT
They watch from nearby.
PAT
Look, don't encourage them anymore.
TIM
There' s no excuse for rudeness. come
on. Let's talk to them.
PAT
(nervously)
The girls? You go ahead.

EXT. WOODS (BOYS) - CONTINUOUS
The boys jump off the tree, and run in the opposite
direction of TONY and the DOG. They run like bell towards

EXT. WOODS (FIGHT) - CONTINUOUS
PAT and TIM are circling each other.
PAT
You're a real man 'Wearing that mask.
Im going to tear that thing off of you,
along with half your face.
Be dives towards TIM and they wrestle to the ground.
a full fledged brawl. They trade ferocious punches,

Atomic Back Breaker.
MAN
ouch, shit.

I didn't hear you? Did that hurt? It
probably didnt hurt as much as the
figure four leg lock will.

INT. CAFETERIA - MORNING MEAL
Tony Perkis is addressing the entire camp.
TONY
Last night I discovered several boys
purchasing food from a dealer of sorts.
I was not able to locate the
perpetrators. Since I do not know who
is filling their bodies with this
poison, the entire camp will begin a
fast effective immediately to cleanse
ourselves of the pollutants in our
systems. This is a very common practice
in the far east and I'm su~e you will
all benefit from it greatly. This fast
will end tomorrow at noon. Until then
you will all subsist on water, and
juice. Also, don't forget parents day
is coming up, and in order to help you
meet your weight goals, on Thursday we
will be going on a twelve mile hike.
Enjoy your fast.
Everyone looks scared. Sever al kids moan.

Did he say no food?

Everyone runs into the woods and grabs the first stick they

LARS

C 'mon. Everybody now. Roostin,
floostin, gram.bar boostin

TONY

Thank you Lars . Your devotion to your
culture is an inspiration to us all.

CONTINUBD:r
Then he moves to a tray of really bad food. Ribs, Pizza, Ice

smart for me. You're my friend. I'm
not mad. I'm happy for you man.

Basy, or I'11 ehase your ass a11 around
